description: The Almighty Insane Popes Nation is a European American street gang based in Chicago, Illinois, formed in the late 1950s. Originally a Greek greaser gang, it adopted the name Popes, standing for 'Protecting Our People Eliminating Spics' (later changed to 'scum'). The gang expanded to include Polish, German, Irish, and Scandinavian members, and later invited Latino and black members. It split into North Side and South Side factions with different alliances.
